description_long: This object depicts an adult human figure lying on their back with arms and legs spread out in a relaxed, supine position. The figure is dressed in a short-sleeved shirt and shorts, with no visible footwear. The head is bald and a separate, dark, semi-circular object is positioned near the head, possibly representing a removable cap or hairpiece. The facial features are minimalistic, with a small nose and mouth visible. The overall style is stylized and cartoon-like, with smooth, rounded limbs and simplified anatomy.
description: A stylized adult human figure in a supine, spread-eagle pose, wearing a short-sleeved shirt and shorts, with a separate cap or hairpiece nearby.
description_view_0: View from the feet looking toward the head, showing the figure's outstretched arms, shorts, and the separate cap or hairpiece above the head.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the profile of the body, the shirt and shorts, and the cap or hairpiece floating beside the head.
description_view_2: View from the head looking toward the feet, showing the face, chest, and the cap or hairpiece to the right of the head.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the body profile and the cap or hairpiece floating to the left of the head.
attribute_posture: lying on back with arms and legs spread
